description: You are a course director at a medical school's emergency medicine department. To comply with CME accreditation and the AHA Program Faculty Agreement, create a corrected adult-only ACLS lecture deck by removing Pediatric Advanced Life Support (PALS) content from /home/ga/Documents/ACLS_lecture.pptx based on the review memo at /home/ga/Desktop/acls_review_memo.txt. Save the corrected file to /home/ga/Documents/ACLS_corrected.pptx without modifying the original document.
